evals.prompt: I want to build a contact management page where clicking a contact shows its details, there's an edit button that swaps the view into a form, and a delete button that removes the row. No React — I want server-rendered HTML with AJAX. My backend is Flask.
evals.expected_output: HTML with htmx attributes: hx-get for loading details, hx-put for saving edits, hx-delete for removing rows, hx-target="this" hx-swap="outerHTML" for view swapping, hx-confirm for delete confirmation, hx-boost for navigation
assertions: Output includes hx-get, hx-put, and hx-delete attributes
Output uses hx-target="this" with hx-swap="outerHTML" for view transitions
Output includes hx-confirm for delete action
Output includes CDN script tag for htmx
Output does not include React/Vue/Svelte imports

evals.prompt: I need a search box that debounces input, shows results as I type, and also triggers on Enter key press. Results go into a table. My backend is Django.
evals.expected_output: HTML with hx-post to search endpoint, hx-trigger with input changed delay:500ms and keyup[key=='Enter'], hx-target on the results table body, htmx indicator for loading state
assertions: Output includes hx-trigger with 'input changed delay:' modifier
Output includes keyup[key=='Enter'] trigger
Output includes hx-target pointing to a results container
Output includes hx-indicator or htmx-indicator class for loading state
Output includes a results container element (table body or div)

evals.prompt: Help me add a file upload form with a progress bar to my Spring Boot application. I want to show upload progress as the file uploads.
evals.expected_output: HTML form with hx-encoding='multipart/form-data', hx-post for upload endpoint, progress element, and JavaScript listener for htmx:xhr:progress event to update the progress bar value
assertions: Output includes hx-encoding='multipart/form-data' or hx-encoding="multipart/form-data"
Output includes a file input element
Output includes a progress element
Output includes JavaScript listener for htmx:xhr:progress event
Output calculates progress percentage from loaded/total

evals.prompt: I'm building a dashboard with a nav bar where all links load via AJAX instead of full page reloads. How do I do that with htmx?
evals.expected_output: HTML nav element with hx-boost="true" wrapping anchor tags, explaining that boosting makes links use AJAX while still working without JS
assertions: Output uses hx-boost="true" on a nav or container element
Output includes anchor tags inside the boosted container
Output explains progressive enhancement (works without JS)

evals.prompt: I want to create a row deletion in a table with a fade-out animation. When the user clicks delete, the row should fade out smoothly before being removed.
evals.expected_output: HTML with hx-delete on delete button, CSS using htmx-swapping class with opacity transition, hx-target="closest tr" hx-swap="outerHTML" with swap delay for animation timing
assertions: Output includes CSS with htmx-swapping class and opacity transition
Output includes hx-delete attribute on delete button
Output uses hx-target="closest tr" or similar selector
Output includes swap timing modifier (swap:Ns)
